final_prompt.prompt:
Create a screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a streamer known as "神仙姐姐".

Style/medium: needs a mobile livestream interface aesthetic — exact UI styling is yours
Composition: must be vertical 9:16 mobile screen format, streamer centered holding sign
Subject: must include a female streamer (神仙姐姐 persona) holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must include typical Douyin livestream UI elements (comments, likes, viewer count)
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging livestream atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" (on the sign held by streamer)
Constraints: must be 9:16 vertical format, must resemble authentic Douyin livestream interface
Avoid:
